scripts.build: npm run build -w @dictivo/shared && npm run build -w @dictivo/api && npm run build -w @dictivo/desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @dictivo/shared && npm run typecheck -w @dictivo/api && npm run typecheck -w @dictivo/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test -w @dictivo/shared && npm run test -w @dictivo/desktop && npm run test -w @dictivo/api
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @dictivo/shared && npm run test:coverage -w @dictivo/desktop && npm run test:coverage -w @dictivo/api
